## Meeting Purpose

[Wrap up Statement of Work (SOW) for GrowthX and Diligent partnership, discuss project kickoff and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SOW expected to be finalized by end of day tomorrow (Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Kickoff meeting scheduled for Monday, June 30th (first thing in the morning)](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [Diligent facing significant SEO challenges: 27-30% YoY traffic drop, especially on product/solution pages](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Strong emphasis on improving metrics quickly; Shathabi needs to show progress to leadership](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

## Topics

### SOW Finalization

  - [Legal team to complete SOW by end of day Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [No major blockers anticipated; standard terms expected](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Kickoff meeting tentatively scheduled before official signature due to timeline](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

### SEO Challenges and Priorities

  - [27-30% YoY traffic drop on product/solution pages](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Recent website migration to new CMS](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Focus on improving organic search presence, especially for "LLMs" (likely "Large Language Models")](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Need to address shift in lead quality (too many SMB leads vs. desired enterprise focus)](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)

### Measurement and Reporting

  - [Current reliance on referral traffic metrics seen as problematic](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Desire for more controlled, meaningful metrics to showcase improvements](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Discussion of potential impact of AI overviews and Google's AI mode on traditional SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

### Project Scope and Considerations

  - [Potential future work with Diligent subsidiary "Bordefect" (equal content volume to Diligent.com)](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Coordination needed with existing agencies (general agency and UK-based SEO agency)](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Content support focus: strategic direction rather than writing](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

### GrowthX Approach

  - [Emphasis on understanding Diligent's brand and personas deeply](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Creation of tailored writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Workflow for internal linking based on topic relevance and SEO signals](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Quick wins through basic SEO optimizations (alt text, meta descriptions, internal linking)](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shathabi to follow up on SOW if not received by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [GrowthX to have EA schedule official kickoff meeting (aiming for Monday morning)](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Shathabi to include John and SEO team member (Casey) in kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare for rapid improvements and showcase early wins](https://fathom.video/share/KeTFR6fqfyyxs8fRGJFns_noDR7TwonX?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
